title: Enriched Brief
description: AI-expanded creative brief produced by brief-enrichment-director. Reviewed and approved by the user at Gate G-0 before intelligence research begins. Contents are a HYPOTHESIS — subject to validation and challenge by intelligence-director.

creative_requirements.description: Pre-brief creative-director worksheet. Every required dimension must be explicitly supplied by the user or explicitly delegated to the creative director before the enriched brief is drafted.

product_name.description: Full product name including edition or variant.

product_type.description: Category and primary function (e.g. 'Personal care / mosquito-repellent floral water').

tagline.description: Short punchy tagline. Original or inferred — must feel designed, not generic.

product_description.description: 2-3 vivid, specific sentences covering ingredients or features, the product's signature effect, and packaging/presentation.

target_demographic.description: Age range, lifestyle context, and primary usage occasion. Specific and non-generic.

visual_style.description: Render mode — cinematic (photorealistic / live-action aesthetic) or animated (motion graphics).

derivative_variants.description: Suggested derivative cuts (e.g. ['15s', '9:16']). May be empty.

tone.description: Minimum 3 adjectives describing the ad's emotional register.

music_direction.description: Full paragraph: opening texture to mid-section energy to climax to outro resolution. Must include dB ducking spec under narration.

budget_usd.description: Estimated AI generation budget in USD.

narrative_arc.description: Exactly 5 named story beats with timestamps that sum to the full duration. HYPOTHESIS — subject to research validation.

beat_name.description: CAPITALISED name for this beat (e.g. THE HEAT, THE HERITAGE, THE MOMENT).

visual_description.description: Cinematographic, sensory description of what is seen. Specific — no vague placeholders.

emotional_target.description: The emotional state the viewer should reach by the end of this beat.

key_action.description: The pivotal action or transition that drives this beat forward.

brand_guideline.description: Visual identity rules for the production.

font_style.description: Headline font style and body font style.

logo_placement.description: Where and when the logo appears.

prohibited_elements.description: At least 3 explicit prohibitions relevant to this product category.

narration_notes.description: Voice direction and key script lines.

voice_description.description: Gender, age range, vocal quality, energy level, and delivery style.

key_lines.description: At least 3 complete sentences (not placeholders) that must appear in or inspire the narration.

target_word_count.description: Target word count derived from duration x words-per-second (typically 2.5 wps for English).

hypothesis_flags.description: Every dimension the brief contains, labelled INFERRED, DELEGATED, or FROM BRIEF. Intelligence uses INFERRED and DELEGATED entries as its validation agenda.

dimension.description: Name of the creative or production dimension (e.g. 'arc_type', 'music_direction', 'target_demographic').

status.description: INFERRED = director filled this in from creative judgment; DELEGATED = user explicitly asked the director to recommend this dimension; FROM BRIEF = user explicitly stated this.

basis.description: One-line rationale: why this value was chosen (INFERRED or DELEGATED) or what the user said (FROM BRIEF).

user_approved.description: Set to true only after the user explicitly replies APPROVE at Gate G-0.

user_edits.description: Log of changes the user made via EDIT replies before approving.

arc_type.description: Hypothesised narrative arc. Optional — INFERRED by brief-enrichment-director when present, surfaced via hypothesis_flags. bible-director compares this against intelligence's classification (uses the same enum as production_bible.narrative.arc_type).

hook_mechanic.description: Hypothesised hook mechanic (e.g. 'question', 'visual-contrast', 'stat'). Optional. Same role as arc_type — surfaced via hypothesis_flags and validated by intelligence.

creative_requirement_dimension.description: One required worksheet dimension. Required dimensions cannot be silently inferred; source must be FROM BRIEF or DELEGATED.

value.description: The user-supplied value or the concrete recommendation the user delegated to the creative director.

source.description: FROM BRIEF = user explicitly supplied or edited this value. DELEGATED = user chose recommend-for-me for this dimension.

basis.description: The user's stated basis or the explicit delegation record.
